scanningNote: Store partially scanned before becoming unavailable. 19 of 43 pages successfully scanned. Remaining 24 pages returned 404 errors, suggesting store taken down or restructured.

colorScheme.rationale: Premium, sophisticated aesthetic. Clean backgrounds emphasize elegant machine design. Warm accents convey luxury and coffee warmth.

typography.characteristics: Sophisticated, premium, refined. Minimalist presentation without aggressive capitalization. Emphasis on product names and coffee collection heritage.

photography.lighting: Bright, clean lighting highlighting design details. Machine photography emphasizes form and craftsmanship. Coffee imagery focuses on quality and appeal.
photography.subjects: Espresso machines (design focus), coffee capsules (close-up, color-focused), coffee preparation (latte art, crema), lifestyle moments

layoutPatterns.homepage: Large hero (3000x1500) + narrow divider (872x218) + wide category tiles (2x872x436) + narrow category grid (8x436x218)
layoutPatterns.machineCategoryPages: Consistent hero (1872x400) + rich editorial content (11-25 images) + product grid
layoutPatterns.machineSubPages: Hero banner (1872x400) + 1-6 supporting videos + product grid. Video count varies by model complexity (1-6 videos based on features).
layoutPatterns.coffeeCategoryPages: Hero (1872x400) + 11 editorial images + collection showcases + product grid
layoutPatterns.coffeeSubPages: Hero banner (1872x400) + minimal supporting imagery (1 image) + product grid. Emphasis on collection story/origin.

hierarchyStructure.navigationDepth: 2-3 levels - main categories (Machines/Coffee) + machine models/coffee collections + potentially sub-variants
hierarchyStructure.distribution: Asymmetrical - Original Maschinen has 10 sub-models, Original Kaffee has 5+ collections. Video content concentrated on machine pages (0-6 videos each) vs coffee pages (0 videos).
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Dual product system (Original espresso + Vertuo pods + Original coffee capsules). Deep specialization on machine models due to technical complexity and variant importance. Coffee collections showcase terroir and heritage.

distribution.rationale: Homepage hero + navigation structure - premium brand positioning gateway
Core product category - comprehensive lineup showcase with rich design exploration
Core coffee category - collection overview and heritage storytelling

distribution.page: Machine sub-pages (10 total: Atelier, Citiz, Essenza Mini, Inissia, Pixie, Gran Lattissima, Lattissima one, Creatista Pro, Creatista Plus, Citiz & Milk)
distribution.rationale: Machine-specific content depth. Video concentration (1-6 per machine) demonstrates feature-driven marketing for technical products. Highest video counts (5-6) for premium milk system machines (Gran Lattissima, Lattissima one, Creatista Pro).

distribution.page: Coffee collection sub-pages (5 total: Ispirazione Italiana, World Explorations, Master Origin, Barista Creations, The Original Collection)
distribution.rationale: Minimal coffee sub-page editorial - focus on story and origin narrative rather than technical detail
Promotional content - minimal editorial for discount/special offers

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Clean, minimalist aesthetic with emphasis on product design. Warm, inviting photography showcasing coffee quality and machine elegance. Sophisticated color palette with premium positioning. Large, high-quality product imagery dominates. Strong focus on technical features for machines (video-heavy) vs heritage storytelling for coffee (image-heavy).
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Premium coffee enthusiasts, design-conscious consumers, professionals, home baristas, convenience-seeking affluent households
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Dual-system approach addressing two distinct audiences: (1) Machine buyers - deep technical exploration with 10+ Original models ranging from entry-level (Essenza Mini) to professional (Creatista Pro), each with video demonstrations of unique features; (2) Coffee enthusiasts - 5+ curated collections from Ispirazione Italiana (Italian heritage) to World Explorations (global origins) to Master Origin (premium single-origin). Accessories, subscription services, and sustainability messaging support loyalty and repeat purchasing. Professional services and registration support B2C engagement.
brandIdentity.operationalContext: P&G/Nestlé operated brand. Store infrastructure suggests sophisticated multi-market presence. 43-page structure with specialized coffee/machine taxonomy reflects global supply chain and regional product variations.

scanningDetails.errorPattern: All unscanned pages returned 'Seite wurde nicht gefunden' (404 not found) errors
likelyScenarios: Store taken offline or significant restructuring
Dynamic URL generation preventing complete scan
scanningDetails.dataQuality: Scanned data is reliable (E/V counts directly observed). Unscanned pages represent approximately 56% of navigation structure - Vertuo system, Accessories, Services, and Special Programs were not captured.
scanningDetails.recommendations: Rescan recommended if store becomes available. Current analysis represents ~44% coverage of intended store architecture.
